target_0.brief_supporting_logic: Structural framing largely intact but roof and upper walls completely missing; extensive voids in walls and floors; vegetation growing through openings; consistent with 75-100% area damage per doctrinal definition for framed buildings.

summary: One building assessed as DESTROYED with CONFIRMED confidence, showing structural framing largely intact but roof and upper walls completely missing, with vegetation growing through openings. The overall scene depicts a single large brick building in advanced ruin, with extensive voids and missing upper sections, consistent with severe structural degradation. The likely functional impact is complete loss of operational capability, as the building is non-functional and structurally compromised.
